title: Countdown feature in board column
excerpt: Right now you can only have a countdown in the dashboard, but I would like to see it next to my deadlines in the project boards to know how long I have until the deadlines and not have to jump back and forth between boar…

posts.author: HannahS (Hanna Smaglis)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now you can only have a countdown in the dashboard, but I would like to see it next to my deadlines in the project boards to know how long I have until the deadlines and not have to jump back and forth between boards and the dashboard.
